name: job-aggregator-mcp
description: Search LinkedIn & Indeed jobs from any AI assistant. Browser-based scraping — no API keys needed.
long_description: A production-grade MCP server that aggregates job listings from LinkedIn and Indeed. Uses browser-based scraping via Patchright (stealth Playwright) so no API keys are required. Supports filters for location, job type, experience level, remote/onsite, and skills. Results are deduplicated across providers.

tools.name: search_jobs
tools.description: Search for jobs across LinkedIn and Indeed with filters (query, location, job_type, experience_level, location_type, skills)

tools.name: get_job_details
tools.description: Get full details for a specific job by its provider-prefixed ID

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Check server status and which job providers are online

linkedin_browser_headless.title: Run Browser Headless
linkedin_browser_headless.description: Run the LinkedIn scraping browser in headless mode (recommended)

linkedin_client_id.title: LinkedIn API Client ID
linkedin_client_id.description: Optional — only needed if you have LinkedIn API access

linkedin_client_secret.title: LinkedIn API Client Secret
linkedin_client_secret.description: Optional — only needed if you have LinkedIn API access

indeed_api_key.title: Indeed API Key
indeed_api_key.description: Optional — only needed if you have Indeed API access
